allow: Bash(echo "=== File Checklist Verification ===" && echo "" && echo "Core Files:" && ls -la app/main.py app/config.py app/database.py 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Routers:" && ls -la app/routers/*.py 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Services:" && ls -la app/services/*.py 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Models:" && ls -la app/models/*.py 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Templates:" && ls -la app/templates/*.py 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Utils:" && ls -la app/utils/*.py 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Migrations:" && ls -la migrations/*.sql 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Tests:" && ls -la tests/*.py 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Admin:" && ls -la admin/*.html 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Config Files:" && ls -la requirements.txt Dockerfile railway.toml .env.example .gitignore README.md 2>/dev/null)
